student_input: I got 450/1100 in Matric, 400/1100 in FSc, and 30/200 in MDCAT. Can I get admission in King Edward Medical University?

state.student_input: I got 450/1100 in Matric, 400/1100 in FSc, and 30/200 in MDCAT. Can I get admission in King Edward Medical University?
state.advice: Although your calculated merit score of 26.14% is a good starting point, unfortunately, you do not meet the eligibility criteria for admission to King Edward Medical University at this time. To improve your chances, consider retaking the MD-CAT exam to increase your score, as it holds significant weight in the merit formula, with 50% of the total score. Additionally, reviewing your past academic performance in matric and FSC, which account for 10% and 40% of the merit score respectively, may help identify areas for improvement. Keep working towards your goal, and don't hesitate to reach out for guidance on how to enhance your application.
